description_long: This is a modern, tactical-style rifle with a modular design, featuring a long, ribbed handguard and a prominent adjustable stock. The body is primarily constructed from metal with some polymer components, and it has a matte, slightly weathered finish. The rifle includes a pistol grip, a detachable magazine, and a flat top receiver with a Picatinny rail for mounting optics or accessories. The barrel is of standard length and appears to have a flash hider at the muzzle. The stock is collapsible, allowing for length adjustment to suit different users. The overall coloration is a muted, bluish-gray, giving it a utilitarian, urban appearance.
description: A modern tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, ribbed handguard, and matte bluish-gray finish. Features include a detachable magazine, pistol grip, and a standard barrel with a flash hider.
description_view_0: Front view showing the barrel end and flash hider, with the handguard and stock aligned behind.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full profile, including the collapsible stock, pistol grip, magazine, and ribbed handguard.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the same features from the other side.
